package rulefixtures

// scenario for hex_encode_to_string_in_loop: `hex.EncodeToString(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario601Negative(encodedValues []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, value := range encodedValues {
		total += len(value)
	}
	return total
}
